rows.label: xs32200100_MSG0010
rows.name:
Thanks to all of you, we've completed a ship
capable of withstanding long-distance voyages.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32200100_MSG0020
rows.name:
The test runs for the transfer system
have shown favorable results as well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32200100_MSG0030
rows.name:
From here on out, we'll support
those who haven't moved to NLA yet,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32200100_MSG0040
rows.name: and guide the residents already in NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32200100_MSG0050
rows.name:
Depending on the disappearance phenomenon,
the Ghosts, and the Growth's movements,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32200100_MSG0060
rows.name:
we will launch the New White Whale even
if all residents haven't boarded.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32200100_MSG0070
rows.name:
We will share information, of course, but may leave
judgment to those on-site in some situations.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32200100_MSG0080
rows.name: Keep that in mind.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32200100_MSG0090
rows.name:
Once the residents are aboard, it's finally
time to launch our assault, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32200100_MSG0100
rows.name: Yeah, from here on, it'll be an all-out war.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32200100_MSG0110
rows.name:
We have to gather what we need to protect,
or we won't be able to protect it all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32200100_MSG0120
rows.name:
Though that means we could
be wiped out in an instant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32200100_MSG0130
rows.name:
Either way, if we lose the Ares,
we have no way to survive.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32200100_MSG0140
rows.name: Our fates are tied together.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32200100_MSG0145
rows.name: Bring it on.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32200100_MSG0150
rows.name:
Where do you think we'll
go after we transfer?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32200100_MSG0160
rows.name: How should I know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32200100_MSG0170
rows.name:
It'd be great if we make
it to another world, but[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32200100_MSG0180
rows.name:
we might end up drifting through
the rift between worlds forever.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32200100_MSG0190
rows.name: Eeeeek, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32200100_MSG0200
rows.name:
Either outcome would likely satisfy
my intellectual curiosity.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32200100_MSG0210
rows.name: Are you getting cold feet?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32200100_JNK0010
rows.name: Resolve

rows.label: xs32200100_SEL0010
rows.name: Smile and say you'll stay with him to the end of the world.

rows.label: xs32200100_MSG0220
rows.name: That's a nice confession.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32200100_MSG0230
rows.name: I love you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32200100_JNK0020
rows.name: Fear

rows.label: xs32200100_SEL0020
rows.name: Honestly confess that you're scared.

rows.label: xs32200100_MSG0240
rows.name:
Knowing fear is the first step
to obtaining true strength.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32200100_MSG0250
rows.name: Elma.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32200100_MSG0260
rows.name:
I hate to ask right away, but
there's a BLADE member named Kylie.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32200100_MSG0270
rows.name:
She says a friend of hers
hasn't arrived here yet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32200100_MSG0280
rows.name:
Sorry, but could you meet with
her and hear the details?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32200100_MSG0290
rows.name: Yes, understood.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32200100_MSG0300
rows.name: Sorry for the trouble.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32200100_MSG0310
rows.name:
Kylie should be in the church
in the Residential Area.[ST:wait ]
